name: Retaining Wall Calculator
seo_description: Need concrete quantities for your retaining wall project? Enter wall length, height, base and crown thickness to get the exact trapezoidal volume plus foundation footing.
example_label: Calculatete concrete and steel for a retaining wall 10m long, 3m high with 0.30m base thickness.

range_hints.altura: Typical: 0.5–4 m — walls over 1.5 m need engineering
range_hints.espesor_base: Rule of thumb: base = height × 0.4 to 0.6

result_context: The retaining wall requires {volumen} m³ of concrete, {cement_sacos} bags of cement, {sand_m3} m³ of sand, {gravel_m3} m³ of gravel and {acero_kg} kg of steel reinforcement.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Height x Thickness
mistakes: Not inclinar The wall hacia The terreno (debería tener ligera inclination)
Omitir drenajes and filtros detrás of the wall to evitar pressure hidrostática
Use thickness of corona insuficiente que reduce The estabilidad
description: Retaining Wall Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Retaining Wall Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
